title: Fruit Fly Potato Culture Media Preparation
author: Jorge Frias
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bei3jcgn

steps.title: Dissolve all following ingredients in 1
steps.instruction: Dissolve all following ingredients in 1.1 L of distilled water: -12.9 g Dried yeast; -1 g White sugar; -40 g Instant mashed potato flakes; -10 g Agar; -0.875 g Ascorbic acid;

steps.title: Let it cool down to 60ºC and add 8
steps.instruction: Let it cool down to 60ºC and add 8.5 mL of 10% Nipagin solution.

steps.title: Mix well and fill about 1/4...
steps.instruction: Mix well and fill about 1/4 of your preferred fruit fly vials or bottles with the medium.

steps.title: On a clean bench hood, let...
steps.instruction: On a clean bench hood, let the medium solidify in the vials with the cap open to avoid water condensation and store at 4ºC for further usage.
